arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the AWS Connect user.

directory_user_id.description: The unique identifier for the user in the directory service.

hierarchy_group_id.description: The ID of the hierarchy group that the user belongs to.

id.description: The unique identifier for the AWS Connect user.

identity_info.description: Contains the user's identity information, including email, first name, and last name.

name.description: The name of the AWS Connect user.

phone_config.description: Configuration settings for the user's phone, including work time limit, auto accept, desk phone number, and phone type.

routing_profile_id.description: The ID of the routing profile assigned to the user.

security_profile_ids.description: A set of security profile IDs associated with the user.

tags.description: A map of tags assigned to the AWS Connect user.

user_id.description: The user ID for the AWS Connect user.
